items.title: S01E01 - The More We Are Together
items.summary: Betty's mother visits the caravan she is now sharing with her workshy husband, Bert

infolabels.title: The More We Are Together
infolabels.plot: Betty's mother visits the caravan she is now sharing with her workshy husband, Bert

items.title: S01E02 - The Ring
items.summary: It's taken Betty several years of hard courting to get a wedding ring; it's taken her just 7 weeks of marriage to lose it. But the ring must be somewhere in the caravan...

infolabels.title: The Ring
infolabels.plot: It's taken Betty several years of hard courting to get a wedding ring; it's taken her just 7 weeks of marriage to lose it. But the ring must be somewhere in the caravan...

items.title: S01E03 - Run Rabbit Run
items.summary: Bert confidently predicts that broiler rabbits will solve all his financial problems and bring the maximum of profit with the minimum of effort. Betty doesn't share his enthusiasm - but the arrival of a boxful of baby bunnies melts her resistance...

infolabels.title: Run Rabbit Run
infolabels.plot: Bert confidently predicts that broiler rabbits will solve all his financial problems and bring the maximum of profit with the minimum of effort. Betty doesn't share his enthusiasm - but the arrival of a boxful of baby bunnies melts her resistance...

items.title: S01E04 - A Rough Night
items.summary: Betty's belief that she deserves better than a caravan home is underlined when Bert and Wally quarrel about a dustbin. With mice and ants as her unlikely allies, and after a night spent sleeping in the car, Betty looks set to win the battle - but who will win the war?

infolabels.title: A Rough Night
infolabels.plot: Betty's belief that she deserves better than a caravan home is underlined when Bert and Wally quarrel about a dustbin. With mice and ants as her unlikely allies, and after a night spent sleeping in the car, Betty looks set to win the battle - but who will win the war?

items.title: S01E05 - The Competition
items.summary: Bert enters a competition to find the country's Ideal Newlyweds - and Betty nearly realises her life-long ambition of spending a proper honeymoon in the sun.

infolabels.title: The Competition
infolabels.plot: Bert enters a competition to find the country's Ideal Newlyweds - and Betty nearly realises her life-long ambition of spending a proper honeymoon in the sun.

items.title: S01E06 - An Addition to the Family
items.summary: Bert and Betty Jones return home late to find that a stranger has broken into their caravan. They understandably take strongarm action, but the bearded intruder resists all attempts at eviction.

infolabels.title: An Addition to the Family
infolabels.plot: Bert and Betty Jones return home late to find that a stranger has broken into their caravan. They understandably take strongarm action, but the bearded intruder resists all attempts at eviction.

items.title: S01E07 - Look After the Pennies
items.summary: Betty decides that if she and Bert are ever to save enough money to buy a house, she must become the breadwinner. Unfortunately Bert is as incompetent as a house-wife as he is at everything else.

infolabels.title: Look After the Pennies
infolabels.plot: Betty decides that if she and Bert are ever to save enough money to buy a house, she must become the breadwinner. Unfortunately Bert is as incompetent as a house-wife as he is at everything else.

items.title: S02E01 - One and One Makes Three
items.summary: Betty and Bert receive a shock when Betty announces a new arrival!

infolabels.title: One and One Makes Three
infolabels.plot: Betty and Bert receive a shock when Betty announces a new arrival!

items.title: S02E02 - The Shower
items.summary: Bert decides to take matters into his own hands, as the caravan site experiences issues with hot water.

infolabels.title: The Shower
infolabels.plot: Bert decides to take matters into his own hands, as the caravan site experiences issues with hot water.

items.title: S02E03 - Just the Job
items.summary: Betty and Lily issue orders to their work-shy spouses to find decent jobs.

infolabels.title: Just the Job
infolabels.plot: Betty and Lily issue orders to their work-shy spouses to find decent jobs.

items.title: S02E04 - For Better or Worse
items.summary: Lily has kicked Wally out, so Betty moves in with Lily and Wally moves in with Bert.

infolabels.title: For Better or Worse
infolabels.plot: Lily has kicked Wally out, so Betty moves in with Lily and Wally moves in with Bert.

items.title: S02E05 - Not So Sweet Charity
items.summary: Puzzled by the fact that Wally and Lily always appear to have money, yet never do any work, Bert discovers they live on social security â€” and that it's not easy to climb aboard that particular gravy train.

infolabels.title: Not So Sweet Charity
infolabels.plot: Puzzled by the fact that Wally and Lily always appear to have money, yet never do any work, Bert discovers they live on social security â€” and that it's not easy to climb aboard that particular gravy train.

items.title: S02E06 - Pack Up Your Troubles
items.summary: Betty comes up with the idea that emigration could be the answer to their issues, though Bert is not so confident.

infolabels.title: Pack Up Your Troubles
infolabels.plot: Betty comes up with the idea that emigration could be the answer to their issues, though Bert is not so confident.

items.title: S03E01 - The New Arrivals
items.summary: Wally and Lily have a new set of neighbours, as a city folk move into the caravan next door. However things are never what they seem.

infolabels.title: The New Arrivals
infolabels.plot: Wally and Lily have a new set of neighbours, as a city folk move into the caravan next door. However things are never what they seem.

items.title: S03E02 - The Invitations
items.summary: Jeremy and Susan are invited to a upper class wedding. However, Jeremy is unable to afford a new dress for Susan, leading to Susan asking Lily for help to make one.

infolabels.title: The Invitations
infolabels.plot: Jeremy and Susan are invited to a upper class wedding. However, Jeremy is unable to afford a new dress for Susan, leading to Susan asking Lily for help to make one.

items.title: S03E03 - Loot
items.summary: Jeremy's honesty is put to the test, when Wally and Lily offer him a carcass of meat which fell off a lorry.

infolabels.title: Loot
infolabels.plot: Jeremy's honesty is put to the test, when Wally and Lily offer him a carcass of meat which fell off a lorry.

items.title: S03E04 - The Dinner
items.summary: A potential employer invites Jeremy and Susan for dinner, Jeremy sees this as an opportunity to move up in life, trading the caravan for a house. Susan then returns the compliment which leads to a memorable evening.

infolabels.title: The Dinner
infolabels.plot: A potential employer invites Jeremy and Susan for dinner, Jeremy sees this as an opportunity to move up in life, trading the caravan for a house. Susan then returns the compliment which leads to a memorable evening.

items.title: S03E05 - Love Is All
items.summary: Susan looks to stimulate her and Jeremy's love life, but has second thoughts when the Briggs have similar plans.

infolabels.title: Love Is All
infolabels.plot: Susan looks to stimulate her and Jeremy's love life, but has second thoughts when the Briggs have similar plans.

items.title: S03E06 - She Loves Me, That Bird
items.summary: A troublesome chicken causes a nightly disturbance in the caravan park.

infolabels.title: She Loves Me, That Bird
infolabels.plot: A troublesome chicken causes a nightly disturbance in the caravan park.

items.title: S03E07 - The Eggs
items.summary: A batch of stolen eggs find their way to Lily and Wally, bringing along with them a lot of trouble.

infolabels.title: The Eggs
infolabels.plot: A batch of stolen eggs find their way to Lily and Wally, bringing along with them a lot of trouble.

items.title: S04E01 - The Dogsbody
items.summary: Jeremy agrees to look after his Managing Directors dog over the weekend, bringing more stress for Susan.

infolabels.title: The Dogsbody
infolabels.plot: Jeremy agrees to look after his Managing Directors dog over the weekend, bringing more stress for Susan.

items.title: S04E02 - Cold Comfort
items.summary: The caravan park sees heavy snowfall, which cuts them off from the outside world. As supplies dwindle the Crichton Jones and Briggs form an uneasy alliance.

infolabels.title: Cold Comfort
infolabels.plot: The caravan park sees heavy snowfall, which cuts them off from the outside world. As supplies dwindle the Crichton Jones and Briggs form an uneasy alliance.

items.title: S04E03 - The Learner Driver
items.summary: Jeremy asks Wally if he can use the car, to have Susan drop him off and pick him up from the station. Jeremy offers to pay some of the running expenses for the car which Wally agrees to. However, there is a small issue with the plan.

infolabels.title: The Learner Driver
infolabels.plot: Jeremy asks Wally if he can use the car, to have Susan drop him off and pick him up from the station. Jeremy offers to pay some of the running expenses for the car which Wally agrees to. However, there is a small issue with the plan.

items.title: S04E04 - A Good Layer
items.summary: Jeremy decides that they should keep a hen so he can have a breakfast egg. Wally and Lily oblige and find Jeremy a hen, however the hen is rather old and well past her prime.

infolabels.title: A Good Layer
infolabels.plot: Jeremy decides that they should keep a hen so he can have a breakfast egg. Wally and Lily oblige and find Jeremy a hen, however the hen is rather old and well past her prime.

items.title: S04E05 - The Washing
items.summary: Tempers fray over the use of the communal clothesline.

infolabels.title: The Washing
infolabels.plot: Tempers fray over the use of the communal clothesline.

items.title: S04E06 - The Night Out
items.summary: Susan and Lily have put their differences aside and decide to get their hair done together, for some special occassions. Susan will be acompanying Jeremy to a work dinner and Wally is taking Lily out to a ball at the local.

infolabels.title: The Night Out
infolabels.plot: Susan and Lily have put their differences aside and decide to get their hair done together, for some special occassions. Susan will be acompanying Jeremy to a work dinner and Wally is taking Lily out to a ball at the local.
